innings_183_pak.emotion: Pure spiritual release, gratitude, roaring belief, announcement of destiny
innings_183_pak.composition: Centered portrait framing. Virat looks skyward, lifting both hands - bat in right hand, helmet in left.

innings_183_pak.bestLayout: 65% Image Panel (Featured Poster style) on Left, 35% Story & Stats Panel on Right.

innings_82_pak.emotion: Ecstasy, relief, deep spiritual connection, absolute victory
